---
title: "Christian Sommer"
image: "chris_800x800.jpg"
links:
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:christian.sommer@uni-tuebingen.de"
  - label: Publications
    url: "https://zotero.org/sommergeo"
  - label: Github
    url: "https://github.com/sommergeo/"
  - label: Bluesky
    url: "https://bsky.app/profile/sommergeo.bsky.social"

output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## Bio

I’m a Physical Geographer who studies the prehistory of landscapes and its implications for early humans with quantitative spatial analyses. My methodological focus lies on GIS, Remote Sensing, Data Mining and Geomorphological field techniques. My temporal and regional foci are the Pleistocene in Africa and Eurasia, and especially the Late Pleistocene of Eastern South Africa. I work at the research center “The Role of Culture in Early Expansions of Humans” (ROCEEH) funded by the Heidelberg Academy of Sciences and Humanities. I teach at the Institute of Geography, Department of Geosciences of the University of Tübingen.


## Education

**Dr. rer. nat.** in Geography | Uni Tübingen, 2021

**M.Sc.** in Physical Geography (GIS & Remote Sensing) | Uni Tübingen, 2016

**B.Sc.** in Physical Geography | Uni Eichstätt-Ingolstadt, 2012


## Online Ressources

- Homepage at the [Heidelberg Academy of Sciences and Humanities]https://en.hadw-bw.de/akademie/beschaeftigte/14)
- Homepage at the [University of Tübingen](https://uni-tuebingen.de/de/92950)
- ORCID: [0000-0001-9062-0876](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9062-0876)
- Zotero: [List of publications](https://zotero.org/sommergeo)
- Google Scholar: [List of publications](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=f2oBVT8AAAAJ)
- ResearchGate: [List of publications](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Christian_Sommer5)
- Github: [Repositories and code](https://github.com/sommergeo/)
- Figshare: [Presentations, figures and maps](https://figshare.com/authors/Christian_Sommer/9470378)
- Sketchfab: [3D Models](https://sketchfab.com/sommergeo)
- Bluesky: [sommergeo.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/sommergeo.bsky.social)
- Mastodon: <a rel="me" href="https://fosstodon.org/@sommer">@sommer@fosstodon.org</a>

## Contact

**christian.sommer@uni-tuebingen.de**

**The Role of Culture in Early Expansions of Humans (ROCEEH)**  
Heidelberg Academy of Sciences and Humanities  
Hölderlinstr. 12  
72074 Tübingen  
Germany 

Room S237  
Phone [+49-7071-29-72131](tel:+4970712972131)

**Institute of Geography**  
Tübingen University  
Department of Geosciences  
Physical Geography and Geoinformation Systems  
Rümelinstr. 19–23  
72070 Tübingen  
Germany  

Room W401  
Phone [+49-7071-29-77505](tel:+4970712977505)
